bitcoin_ethereum.exchanger: AlwaysMoney This exchanger does not fix the exchange rate in the order.

solana_bitcoin.exchanger: PayMarket This exchanger states the exchange rate in the request if the market exchange rate changes by not more than 0.3 %. This exchanger runs in the manual or semiautomatic mode.

bitcoin_litecoin.exchanger: BitFm This exchanger states the exchange rate in the request if the market exchange rate changes by not more than 0.25 %. This exchanger runs in the manual or semiautomatic mode.

bitcoin_cardano.exchanger: Enter-Change This exchanger states the exchange rate in the request if the market exchange rate changes by not more than 0.05 %. This exchanger may require verification of the client's documents or halt the payment to check other data. This exchanger runs in the manual or semiautomatic mode.
